description:
This quiz evaluates a developer's proficiency in Node.js I/O operations, ranging from fundamental file system tasks to advanced streaming and buffer management. Designed with an enthusiastic and encouraging tone, it targets intermediate to advanced learners looking to optimize data handling efficiency. The assessment covers core concepts like encoding and performance best practices to reinforce practical backend development skills.
Topics: Node.js I/O Operations, File System Handling, Data Streaming, Buffers, Data Encoding, Performance Best Practices
Audience: Intermediate to advanced Node.js developers and backend engineers
